title: Open the home page and reach group trips
description: This verifies that a traveler can load the home page and use the primary call to action to reach group trips.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to explore group trips
Verify the group trips page is displayed

title: Complete a trip booking from prefilled checkout
description: This verifies a traveler can open checkout with trip details, enter required information, and complete booking successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout?trip=Sunset%20Paradise&price=499
Fill in the traveler name field with Alex Carter
Fill in the email field with alex@example.com
Fill in the phone field with 5551234567
Fill in the traveler count field with 2
Submit the booking form
Verify a booking confirmation is visible
Verify the trip summary is completed

title: Navigate across primary sections from the desktop navbar
description: This verifies that a traveler can use the persistent navigation bar to move between the main site sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open group trips
Verify the group trips page is displayed
Click the link to open weekend trips
Verify the weekend trips page is displayed
Click the link to open upcoming trips
Verify the upcoming trips page is displayed

title: Start checkout from a featured trip
description: This verifies that a browsing user can discover a featured trip on the home page and begin booking with trip and price details passed forward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a featured trip booking link
Verify the checkout page is displayed with trip details prefilled

title: Search group trips and open a trip itinerary
description: This verifies that a user can narrow group trips by search or filter and open a matching itinerary detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /group-trips
Enter a destination search term
Verify matching trip results are displayed
Click a matching trip
Verify the itinerary detail page is displayed

title: Load the home page content successfully
description: This verifies that the home page renders the expected discovery content for a browsing user.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero content is displayed
Verify featured destination discovery content is displayed

title: Open an itinerary detail page
description: A browsing user can open a trip itinerary page and review the day-by-day plan.

steps.description: Navigate to an itinerary detail page with a valid trip id
Verify the itinerary day-by-day plan is displayed
Verify itinerary details for multiple days are visible

title: Keep the user on checkout when required traveler details are missing
description: This verifies checkout shows validation feedback and does not complete booking when required traveler information is left blank.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout?trip=Sunset%20Paradise&price=499
Submit the booking form
Verify validation errors are visible
Verify the booking is not completed

title: Download an itinerary from the detail page
description: A booking customer can open the itinerary download modal and complete the download flow from a valid itinerary page.

steps.description: Navigate to an itinerary detail page with a valid trip id
Open the itinerary download modal
Confirm the itinerary download action
Verify a download confirmation is visible
Verify the itinerary remains available after the download action

title: Use the mobile menu to reach upcoming trips
description: This verifies that a mobile user can open the hamburger menu and navigate to upcoming trips.

steps.description: Navigate to /group-trips
Open the mobile navigation menu
Click the link to open upcoming trips
Verify the upcoming trips page is displayed

title: Filter group trips by style and browse the updated results
description: This verifies that a user can apply a trip style filter and see the trip list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /group-trips
Select a trip style filter
Verify the trip list updates to matching results

title: Browse weekend trip listings
description: A traveler can open the weekend trips page and view available short getaway packages.

steps.description: Navigate to /weekend-trips
Verify weekend trip packages are displayed
Verify at least one weekend trip option is visible

title: Use contact actions from the home page
description: This verifies that a guest user can access the floating contact actions from the home page and launch a contact method.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call contact action
Verify a phone contact action is launched
Navigate to /
Click the WhatsApp contact action
Verify a WhatsApp contact action is launched

title: Browse upcoming trip departures
description: A traveler can open the upcoming trips page and review scheduled departures with dates.

steps.description: Navigate to /upcoming-trips
Verify upcoming departures are displayed
Verify departure dates are visible

title: Return home from the brand logo
description: This verifies that a browsing user can use the brand logo to navigate back to the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /group-trips
Click the brand logo
Verify the home page is displayed

title: Show an error state for checkout without valid trip details
description: This verifies checkout does not build a booking summary when trip or price information is missing from the URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Verify an error state is visible
Verify the user is prompted to return to a trip page

title: Show an empty state when no group trips match
description: This verifies that a user sees a clear empty state when a search or filter returns no group trips.

steps.description: Navigate to /group-trips
Enter a search term that matches no trips
Verify an empty state message is displayed

title: Handle no upcoming departures
description: A traveler can view an empty state when the upcoming trips page has no departures to show.

steps.description: Navigate to /upcoming-trips
Apply a filter or search that results in no upcoming departures
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no departure entries are displayed

title: Handle empty weekend trip results
description: A traveler can search or filter the weekend trips page to a state with no matches and see an empty-state message.

steps.description: Navigate to /weekend-trips
Apply search or filter criteria that exclude all weekend trip options
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no weekend trip cards are displayed

title: Show a home fallback when content cannot render
description: This verifies that the home page shows an error or fallback state when required home content is unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify a home page fallback or error state is displayed

title: Show itinerary not found for an unknown trip
description: A traveler opening an unknown itinerary id can see a not-found or error state instead of itinerary content.

steps.description: Navigate to an itinerary detail page with an unknown trip id
Verify a not-found or error state is visible
Verify itinerary details are not displayed

title: Show a browsing fallback when group trips cannot be displayed
description: This verifies that the group trips page shows an error or retry state when the trip list cannot be shown normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /group-trips
Verify a group trips fallback or error state is displayed

title: Retry checkout after a failed booking submission
description: This verifies a booking failure is shown clearly and the user can retry the checkout flow from the same page.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout?trip=Sunset%20Paradise&price=499
Fill in the traveler name field with Alex Carter
Fill in the email field with alex@example.com
Fill in the phone field with 5551234567
Fill in the traveler count field with 2
Submit the booking form
Verify a booking failure message is visible
Verify a retry option is available

title: Show a navigation fallback when links are not usable
description: This verifies that the app shows a navigation error or fallback state when the navbar cannot route correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify a navigation fallback or error state is displayed

title: Show itinerary download error state
description: A user can attempt to download an itinerary and see an in-app error state when the download action cannot complete.

steps.description: Navigate to an itinerary detail page with a valid trip id
Open the itinerary download modal
Confirm the itinerary download action
Verify a download error message is visible
Verify the modal remains open or shows recovery controls
